text:
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
Null = Default 
V = Valid death date 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived from the enrollment database's beneficiary source death date code, or from the 
presence of a claim status code = '20' (expired) on the last claim record included in the stay.
